//: Scoped tsconfig — type-check only the pure domain layer and store.
Rest of the app stays JSX/JS without TS validation for now; expanding
the include list is the migration path when other directories are
ready. checkJs + allowJs means our existing JSDoc types get validated
by tsc without renaming a single file. noEmit because Vite handles
the actual build; we only want tsc as a linter for type correctness.
